{{CargoRelic
|name=Family Mug
|class_id=20539
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Home is a cozy and secure haven, much like a warm cup of coffee. The rising steam and the rich aroma of coffee beautifully capture the delicate tenderness and warmth of a family. You can feel the profound affection within, as if being enveloped by a mother's embrace all around.
|fame=15
|art=16
|fth=13
|civ=31
|tech=15
|ss1=Snail HP +200<br>Per 50 Minions healed, Snail RUSH +1<br>Minions healed: 2000/2000
|ss2=Snail HP +400<br>Per 50 Minions healed, Snail RUSH +2<br>Minions healed: 2000/2000
|ss3=Snail HP +600<br>Per 50 Minions healed, Snail RUSH +3<br>Minions healed: 2000/2000
|ss4=Snail HP +600<br>Per 50 Minions healed, Snail RUSH +3<br>Minions healed: 2000/2000
|ss7=Snail HP +600<br>Per 50 Minions healed, Snail RUSH +3<br>Minions healed: 2000/2000<br> (Awakened)
}}
